name: Old School Vegetable Pakora
description: Potato and onion coated in gram and self-raising flour, served with chilli or meat sauce.

name: Onion Bhaji
description: Traditional recipe of green chilli, gram flour and garam masala.

name: Aloo Mattar ki Tikki
description: Shallow fried potatoes & green peas tikki (patty).

name: Vegetable Samosa
description: Pastry parcel stuffed with potatoes and green peas.

name: Chutney Paneer Tikka
description: Chargrilled homemade cheese marinated with fresh mint, green chilli, carom seeds and ginger garlic.

name: Stuffed Tandoori Mushroom
description: Stuffed with cheese and chopped spices. Cooked in the clay oven.

name: Badal Jaam
description: Grilled aubergine topped with tomato masala, cheese, celery and cumin flavoured yoghurt.

name: Aloo & Chana Chaat
description: Spiced potato and chickpea with a mint, tamarind, yoghurt, and sweet chilli dressing.

name: Pakora Chaat
description: Vegetable pakora with spiced chickpea, mint, yoghurt, tamarind and sweet chilli dressing.

name: Veg Samosa Chaat
description: Crushed samosa with spiced chickpea, mint, tamarind, yoghurt, and sweet chilli dressing.

name: Crispy Chilli Mushroom
description: Stuffed with cheese, green chilli, ginger, garlic & finished with crispy coating.

name: Crispy Chilli Squid
description: Marinated with crushed chilli and freshly ground spice.

name: Fish Koliwada
description: Marinated in a spice blend, carom seeds and coated in gram flour batter, fried till crunchy.

name: Achari Salmon
description: Marinated with yoghurt, ginger, chilli and homemade pickle.

name: Pepper Monkfish Tikka
description: Monkfish marinated with cheese, yoghurt and crushed black pepper.

name: Prawn Kolhapuri
description: Marinated with curry leaves, cumin and a crisp chickpea flour coating.

name: Tandoori King Prawn
description: King prawns marinated with mustard, fresh green chilli, ginger, garlic and soft cheese.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Tikka
description: Boneless chicken marinated with yoghurt, garlic, ginger and deggi mirch.

name: Mango Chicken Tikka
description: Chicken breast marinated with ginger, garlic, green chilli and hint of mango.

name: Dohra Seekh
description: Chicken and lamb mince infused with garlic, ginger and freshly ground spices.

name: Chicken Pakora
description: Strips of chicken fillet marinated, battered and deep-fried.

name: Fish Pakora
description: Marinated white fish in a crisp gram flour batter.

name: Tandoori Lamb Chops
description: Marinated with honey and fresh green chilli. Served with green chutney.

name: Triple Platter Starter
description: Aloo & Chana Chaat, Chicken Pakora & Chilli Squid. Serves 2.
